testimonials.title: High Impact
testimonials.subtitle: Technical feedback from leaders and teams who have collaborated on my implementations.

items.name: Jeferson Salas Ynga
items.text: The digital asset delivery architecture Emerson implemented has been flawless. He integrated multiple payment gateways with 99.9% resilience and fully automated media licensing and distribution. His ability to handle complex transactional logic is outstanding.

items.name: Aby Reyes
items.text: The cloud-native e-commerce platform transformed our business. We now manage orders in real-time with automated synchronization. The backend scalability allowed us to handle a 250% increase in demand without any performance degradation.

items.name: Hiroshi Tanaka
items.text: The transactional POS engine modernized our operations. We process 50K+ transactions monthly with minimal latency. The system is robust, secure, and scalable, exceeding all our technical expectations.

items.name: Eisten Mendoza
items.text: Emerson led the development of Netmuz Social, the social network for musicians. A complex platform with event management, marketplace and professional networking. His technical vision and ability to solve complex challenges were fundamental to the project's success.

items.name: Benjamin Suarez
items.text: Learning programming with Emerson at CompilandoCode changed my career. His practical methodology and clear explanations helped me master React and Python. Today I work as a junior developer thanks to his teachings. The best teacher I've ever had.

items.name: Miguel Torres
items.text: Emerson's courses at CompilandoCode are incredible. I went from not knowing how to program to developing my own web application in 4 months. His focus on real projects and his patience in teaching are exceptional. 100% recommended.

items.name: Carlos Vega
items.text: The system he developed for our innovation lab allowed us to manage technological challenges, teams and evaluations in an integrated way. The platform is robust, scalable and exactly what we needed to drive innovation.

items.name: Ana López
items.text: Emerson implemented a government registration and management system that modernized our processes. His professionalism, deadline compliance and technical capability were exceptional. The system works perfectly and has significantly improved our response times.

summary.title: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
summary.content: Systems Engineer with 6+ years of technical experience architecting scalable and resilient backend solutions on the Azure cloud. Expert in the Node.js ecosystem and event-driven architectures processing critical volumes of data. Proven track record leading the transformation of complex infrastructures, optimizing performance by 70% and reducing operational costs through serverless orchestration. Technical mentor with a focus on engineering excellence and code quality.

instructions.title: How to Create Your Professional Resume
instructions.subtitle: Create your resume in 3 simple steps

step1.title: Fill out your information
step1.description: Complete the form with your personal data, work experience, projects, and skills

step2.title: Choose a template
step2.description: Select from 3 professional formats: Corporate, Harvard, or Minimal

step3.title: Download your PDF
step3.description: Generate your resume in PDF format with text or image. Save different versions for each position

tips.title: Professional Tips
tips.tip1: Adapt your resume for each job position
tips.tip2: Use the Harvard template for traditional companies
tips.tip3: The Corporate template is ideal for tech companies
tips.tip4: Save different versions for different industries
